---
title: "Projects"
---

Here are a few things I've been working on:

::: {.project-card}
### Personal Website
Built with Quarto — this site you're looking at right now! Features custom CSS theming, multiple pages, and a responsive navbar.

[Source Code](https://github.com) &nbsp; | &nbsp; [Live Site](#)

[Quarto]{.tag} [CSS]{.tag} [Markdown]{.tag}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Data Visualization Dashboard
An interactive dashboard exploring trends in global climate data using R and Plotly.

[Source Code](https://github.com) &nbsp; | &nbsp; [Live Demo](#)

[R]{.tag} [Plotly]{.tag} [Data Viz]{.tag}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Machine Learning Classifier
A sentiment analysis model trained on movie reviews using Python and scikit-learn.

[Source Code](https://github.com)

[Python]{.tag} [scikit-learn]{.tag} [NLP]{.tag}
:::
